SKIPPED event 0001193125-24-253707 (8-K 2024-11-08): content is only form metadata ('Item 1.01 Entry into a Material Definitive Agreement') with no description of the agreement - too vague to name a cause.

SKIPPED vague/boilerplate prose: 'raw material constraints' capex boilerplate, 'changes in working capital' (folded into operating_cash_flow evidence), undistributed-foreign-earnings repatriation note.
south_korea_franchise_sales: table row is Outback Steakhouse-branded in South Korea; brand omitted for name brevity - fold stage may prefer the brand-level form.
executive_severance_costs covers the CEO-transition cost adjustment; 'transition' is a banned name token so the severance/compensation-cost noun was used.
convertible_notes_repurchase (the exchange transaction) and debt_extinguishment_loss (its P&L charge) kept as separate candidates: distinct cause vs accounting-charge class.
